title: Dr. B.B.A. Govt. Polytechnic Silvassa – Lecturer – 4 Posts

basic_details.job_title: Dr. B.B.A. Govt. Polytechnic Silvassa Lecturer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: Dr. B.B.A. Govt. Polytechnic Silvassa Recruitment 2026 for 4 posts of Lecturer. Candidates with M.Sc, B.E/B.Tech Can Apply Offline. The last date to apply offline is 15-06-2026. The candidate shall apply offline through Dr. B.B.A. Govt. Polytechnic Silvassa official website ddd.gov.in.

qualification.education_qualification: Master's Degree in Physics with First Class or Equivalent at Bachelor's or Master's level from a recognised University or Institute, Bachelor's degree in Electrical Engineering from a recognised University with First Class or Equivalent, Bachelor's degree in Textile Manufacturing Technology from a recognised University with First Class or Equivalent

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: ddd.gov.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 15-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.
